## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? Link any related issues with "Closes #123" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — no behaviour change
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` / `ci` — tooling, deps, config

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? -->

- [ ] Existing tests pass locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behaviour
- [ ] Manually tested in Discord (if bot-facing)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow conventional commit format (`feat: ...`, `fix: ...`)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `.env` values committed
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff before requesting review
